assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AccessTokenType = AccessTokenType.Reference
The web_app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 900 (15 minutes)
The ApiResource api1_resource has ApiSecrets with at least one Secret configured
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `ApiSecrets = { new Secret("secret".Sha256()) }` on ApiResource for introspection.
SKILL.md shows `.Sha256()` in the ApiResource secrets example.
